economic_notes: One-seventh ownership in South Beach Casino Limited Partnership (casino and hotel on Brokenhead Ojibway Nation land at Scanterbury, Manitoba). Partnership also includes South Beach Capital Partners Limited Partnership and South Beach Management Services Ltd. Major capital construction underway including Lake Winnipeg School Bundle ($15.9M in progress) and new band-owned housing units.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 but audit report dated January 17, 2023 — significant delay in audit completion. Consolidated entity includes Bloodvein First Nation, Bloodvein First Nation Health Authority, and Bloodvein First Nation Housing Authority (3 subsidiaries). South Beach Casino Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method (1 GBE). Large construction in progress of $18.46M (Lake Winnipeg School Bundle $15.9M plus new housing). Revenue includes deferred revenue recognition mechanics resulting in large gross deferred revenue figures. No schedule of remuneration included in document. ISC funding nearly doubled year-over-year ($12M to $21.9M), largely due to capital project funding. Long term investments represent equity in South Beach Casino LP which declined from $2.7M to $1.8M.
warnings: High ISC dependency (83.4%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
